tweets.text: RT @FirstLadyOffice: THANK YOU, HAWAII // Fostering the Future Accounts Hawaii has taken an important step forward for children in foster care. Governor Josh Green, MD, has pledged to support Fostering the Future Accounts. This program will help children in foster care build a stronger financial foundation as they grow into adulthood. We salute Governor Green for his leadership and hope every governor across America joins Fostering the Future Accounts so that every child can have a chance for a brighter future.
